ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist performs */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "artist_social_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* A score indicating the artist's popularity */,
  "artist_followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the album belongs to */,
  "album_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "album_popularity" INTEGER /* A score indicating the album's popularity */,
  "album_streams_count" INTEGER /* Total number of streams the album has received */,
  "album_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the album in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "song_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the song's cover image (if different from the album) */,
  "song_popularity" INTEGER /* A score indicating the song's popularity */,
  "song_streams_count" INTEGER /* Total number of streams the song has received */,
  "song_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "song_lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* The key the song is in */,
  "mode" TEXT /* The mode of the song (major or minor) */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* The time signature of the song */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* The track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, artist, admin) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biography or about me section for the user */,
  "user_followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "user_following_count" INTEGER /* Number of artists or users the user is following */,
  "user_playlist_count" INTEGER /* Number of playlists created by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's cover image */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_song_count" INTEGER /* Number of songs in the playlist */,
  "playlist_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  "playlist_followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "playlist_song_order" INTEGER /* Order of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date the artist was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being shared */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date the song was shared */,
  "share_comment" TEXT /* Comment or note added by the user when sharing the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
